title: Arcwise - Puffish Skill Tree
description: Arcwise uses Pufferfish Skills Mod to create an Basic-User Friendly Skill Tree that makes Minecraft even more Fun!
body:
## Arcwise - Puffish Skill Tree
![Arcwise - Puffish Skill Tree](https://i.postimg.cc/59KwzwQ0/Arcwise-Mod.png)

_A mod which uses Pufferfish Skills & Attributes to add own Skill Trees and Functions._
_Utilizes almost every Pufferfish Atribute!_
- Arcwise aims for Players that like simple Mods, it originally tries to replace McMMO in some way, not exactly but for those who want Simple & Fun Mod for their RPG Mods this is Perfect one ❤️
- **Full experience, Day, Classic and Night version makes your gameplay smoother and more enjoyable!**
- **All rights reserved. Copying this mod or modifying its source code will result in action**

---

## Getting Started
**How to setup Arcwise? (Singleplayer)**
- First install Required Dependecies with matching version of Arcwise.
- Put all 3 Mods in `Mods` Folder
- Boot up Minecraft, create world and its done!
---
**How to setup Arcwise? (Multiplayer)**
- First install Required Dependecies with matching version of Arcwise.
- Put all 3 Mods in `Mods` Folder (Client Side), and also put those same 3 Mods in Server's Mods
- Boot up Minecraft, join the Server and its done!
---

## Compatibility & Versions
- Arcwise supports `Fabric` and `Neoforge` and ˛`Forge` for various Versions
- Arcwise will receive Future Updates as Pufferfish Skills/Atributes gets updated Arcwise will be updated shortly after
---

**_Thanks to anyone who uses this Mod, and especially big thanks to Pufferfish for making a Great Mod, and Support Server is Great too!_**
> Bugs and Suggestions can be sent in [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/MmJ3PQWVSS)

---

## Each section Explained

### Combat
- How to earn XP?
  - Kill Entities (Zombies, pigs, cows, skeletons..)
- Available Skills:
  - `5% & 10%` Attack Speed
  - `5% & 10%` Knockback
  - `5% & 10%` Melee Damage
  - `5% & 10%` Ranged Damage
  - `5% & 10%` Resistance
  - `+1` Heart
- Different Sword, different XP output
  - Wooden - `1` XP
  - Stone - `2` XP
  - Golden - `2` XP
  - Iron - `3` XP
  - Diamond - `4` XP
  - Netherite - `5` XP
- Different Mob, different XP output
  - Enderman - `5` XP
  - Elder Guardian - `50` XP
  - Warden - `100` XP
  - Ender Dragon - `1000` XP
  - Bow - `10` XP
  - Crossbow - `7` XP


---
### Woodworking
- How to earn XP?
  - Chop down Trees and any other structure which is related to wood.
- Available Skills:
  - `5%` Mining Speed
  - `5%` Axe Speed
  - `5%` Fortune
  
- Different Axe, different XP output
  - Wooden - `1` XP
  - Stone - `2` XP
  - Golden - `2` XP
  - Iron - `3` XP
  - Diamond - `4` XP
  - Netherite - `5` XP

---
### Mining
- How to earn XP?
  - Mine Stone & Other Ores
- Available Skills:
  - `5%` Mining Speed
  - `5%` Pickaxe Speed
  - `5%` Fortune
  
- Different Pickaxe, different XP output
  - Wooden - `1` XP
  - Stone - `2` XP
  - Golden - `2` XP
  - Iron - `3` XP
  - Diamond - `4` XP
  - Netherite - `5` XP

- Different Ores, different XP output
  - Coal - `1` XP
  - Copper - `2` XP
  - Iron - `2` XP
  - Lapis Lazuli - `3` XP
  - Redstone - `3` XP
  - Emerald - `10` XP
  - Diamond - `3` XP
  - Gold - `3` XP
  - Nether Gold - `3` XP
  - Nether Quartz - `3` XP

---
### Excavation
- How to earn XP?
  - Mine Dirt, Flint etc...
- Available Skills:
  - `5%` Mining Speed
  - `5%` Shovel Speed
  - `5%` Fortune
  
- Different Shovel, different XP output
  - Wooden - `1` XP
  - Stone - `2` XP
  - Golden - `2` XP
  - Iron - `3` XP
  - Diamond - `4` XP
  - Netherite - `5` XP

---
### Tough Guy
- How to earn XP?
  - Take Damage & Eat Food (Specific food list below)
- Available Skills:
  - `5%` Resistance
  - `5%` Ranged Resistance
  - `5%` Melee Resistance
  - `5%` Sprinting Speed
  - `5%` Magic Resistance
  - `10%` Stamina
  
- Different Food, same XP output
  - Bread - `1` XP
  - Apple - `1` XP
  - Melon - `1` XP
  - Cooked Steak - `1` XP
  - Baked Potato - `1` XP
  - Carrot - `1` XP
  - Baked Potato - `1` XP
  - And so on... Almost all food is added and they all equally give `1` XP

---
### Vampire
- How to earn XP?
  - Deal Damage to Entities
- Available Skills:
  - **__Life Steal__**
  - `5%` Resistance Shred
  - `5%` Toughness Shred
  - `5%` Armor Shred
  - `5%` Protection Shred
  - `10%` Stamina

---

### Herbalism
- How to earn XP?
  - Harvest Crops, Bamboo, Grass..
- Available Skills:
  - `5%` Jump
  - `5%` Healing
  - `5%` Stamina

- Sources:
   - Flowers - `1` XP
   - Crops - `1` XP
   - Bamboo - `1` XP
   - Grass - `1` XP
   - Cactus - `1` XP
   - Pumpkin / Melon - `1` XP
   - Sugarcane - `1` XP
   - Haybale - `1` XP
   - Fishing - `3` XP

---

### Arcanist
- How to earn XP?
  - Deal Damage to Entities with Potions
- Available Skills:
  - `5%` Magic Resistance
  - `5%` Magic Damage
  - `5%` Magic Resistance Shred
- XP Source (Explained)
  - Splash Potion of Harming - XP Is calculated like this `damage * 3`, so how much damage you deal and 3x that. Works on all mobs.
  - Splash Potion of Healing - XP Is calculated same way. Works on Undead Mobs.
